title: Highschool Life
overview: Rock finds himself in a high school world.

title: The Magical Girl
overview: Revy becomes a magical girl, and gives Rock some questionable help.

title: The Melancholy of Balalaika
overview: Balalaika has trouble raising Hansel and Gretel.

title: Boys and Girls
overview: Rock finds himself in a world where boys and girls have swapped genders. He is now a woman, and from there things get worse.

title: Summer Evening Spooky Story Contest
overview: The gang tells each other spooky stories.

title: Viva! Youth!
overview: Rock finds himself back in high school, and discovers the others around him have had trouble with their childhood.

title: Go for it! Manzai Grand Prix!
overview: A manzai comedy routine goes badly wrong.
